    current_size = 0_int64

    i.each_index do |j|

        current_size += 1
      end

    if m_a.has_key?(current_xor)

    end

  num_subsets_b = 1 << n_b

    len = arr.len

def solve(nums : Array(Int64), target : Int64) : Int64

  mb = Hashmap[Int64, Int64].new

    len = arr.len

      current_xor = 0.to_int64
      current_size = 0.to_int64

      end
    end

  populate_map(B, mb)

    # Required XOR sum from B

      current_size = ka + kb
      
      if current_size > max_size

    # No combination achieved the target
    return -1.to_int64
  end
  
  # Minimum removals = Total elements - Maximum remaining elements
